title: SoloMemoryEvent
description: One audit-safe memory event for the Solo Founder Nodes loop. Remember decisions, constraints, proofs, and preferences — never benchmark answers. Held-out task contents must never be persisted: use benchmarkSafety='heldout_forbidden' (which the writer rejects) or store only split hashes, aggregate scores, and failure classes.

projectId.description: The app/repo this memory belongs to.

userId.description: Optional founder id for L3 cross-project preferences.

summary.description: One line; this is what recall ranks on.

content.description: Expanded detail. Never put held-out task prompts/answers here.

benchmarkSafety.description: safe=persist+search; tuned_only=persist but never reason about held-out contents; aggregate_only=metrics/failure-classes/split-hashes only (requires metadata.aggregateOnly=true); heldout_forbidden=REJECT the write; redacted=local only, never sync to a cloud adapter.
